item.title: NexusRaven-V2 (Nexusflow)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model AI model by Nexusflow

item.title: SARA-RT-2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 5B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google DeepMind

item.title: Playground v2 (Playground)
item.description: License: open Type: model AI model by Playground

item.title: Baize-v2-13B (白泽) (University of California San Diego,Sun Yat-sen University,Microsoft Research Asia)
item.category: University of California San Diego,Sun Yat-sen University,Microsoft Research Asia
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model AI model by University of California San Diego,Sun Yat-sen University,Microsoft Research Asia

item.title: MACE-MP-0 (Cambridge)
item.description: Parameters: MACE-MP-0 License: open Type: model "Uses 4-body equivariant messages; covers 89 elements; supports fine-tuning for ab initio accuracy with minimal data."

item.title: Unified-IO 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: Unified-IO 2 License: open Type: model 600TB dataset (plus 120+ fine-tuning datasets) includes '1B imagetext pairs, 1T text tokens, 180M video clips, 130M interleaved image & text, 3M 3D assets, and 1M agent trajectories.'

item.title: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B License: closed Type: model To obtain WaveCoder models, We choose StarCoder-15B, CodeLLaMa (7B and 13B), DeepseekCoder-6.7B as the base model and fine-tune all the base model for 3 epochs

item.title: YunShan (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: YunShan License: closed Type: model Finance + law fine-tune of PanGu-π

item.title: PanGu-Pi (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: PanGu-Pi License: closed Type: model Dense, named PanGu-π

item.title: YAYI 2 (Wenge)
item.description: Parameters: YAYI 2 License: open Type: model Dataset=240TB filtered to 10.6TB for 2.65T tokens

item.title: Emu2 (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: Emu2 License: open Type: model VLM. Gemini clone. Outperforms Flamingo 80B. The Pile for text, but only sampled 3.6B tokens (1.4% of the dataset).

item.title: MedLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: MedLM License: partial Type: model Available to 'white-listed' orgs only.

item.title: SOLAR-10.7B (Upstage AI)
item.description: Parameters: SOLAR-10.7B License: open Type: model South Korean. Llama-2 arch. SOTA for its size (Dec/2023).

item.title: DeciLM-7B (Deci)
item.description: Parameters: DeciLM-7B License: open Type: model 4.4x times faster than Mistral. English only.

item.title: Mistral-medium (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Mistral-medium License: open Type: model MMLU=75.3% (GPT-3.5-turbo 20B=70%, Llama 2 70B=68.9%)

item.title: mixtral-8x7b-32kseqlen (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: mixtral-8x7b-32kseqlen License: open Type: model MoE=7Bx8, aka mistral-small. 'Concretely, Mixtral has 45B total parameters but only uses 12B parameters per token. It, therefore, processes input and generates output at the same speed and for the same cost as a 12B model.'

item.title: StripedHyena 7B (Together)
item.description: Parameters: StripedHyena 7B License: open Type: model RedPajama (C4), new arch beyond just Transformers

item.title: NexusRaven-V2 13B (Nexusflow.ai)
item.description: Parameters: NexusRaven-V2 13B License: open Type: model Based on CodeLlama. 'surpasses GPT-4 by up to 7% in function calling success rates in human-generated use cases involving nested and composite functions.'

item.title: Gemini Ultra 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini Ultra 1.0 License: open Type: model Original MMLU=83.7. MMLU=90.04 with prompting. Chinchilla (20:1), dense, maybe 600B-2000T. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: Mamba License: open Type: model The Pile, new arch beyond just Transformers. 2.7B MMLU=26.2. 7B MMLU=33.3.

item.title: LVM-3B (Berkeley/JHU)
item.description: Parameters: LVM-3B License: closed Type: model Paper is 25MB. First Large Vision Model (LVM); no text. Based on Llama and LAION 5B (1.49B).

item.title: SeaLLM-13b (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: SeaLLM-13b License: open Type: model Llama 2 for Southeast Asian (SEA) languages: Vietnamese 🇻🇳, Indonesian 🇮🇩, Thai 🇹🇭, Malay 🇲🇾, Khmer🇰🇭, Lao🇱🇦, Tagalog🇵🇭 and Burmese🇲🇲

item.description: Parameters: 23.4M License: closed Type: model AI model by Carnegie Mellon University (CMU),Princeton University

item.title: BlueLM 130B (vivo AI lab)

item.title: BlueLM 175B (vivo AI lab)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: closed Type: model AI model by vivo AI lab

item.title: Yi 6B (01.AI)
item.description: Parameters: 6B License: open Type: model AI model by 01.AI

item.title: pplx-70b-online (Perplexity)
item.description: Parameters: pplx-70b-online License: open Type: model Web access. Higher 'freshness' and 'truth' scores.

item.title: SeamlessM4T-Large v2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: SeamlessM4T-Large v2 License: open Type: model Based on NLLB and older models. https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication

item.title: Q-Transformer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Q-Transformer License: closed Type: model Robotics, builds on RT-1

item.title: Yuan 2.0 (IEIT)
item.description: Parameters: Yuan 2.0 License: open Type: model Chinese + EN dataset include The Pile: DM, arxiv, wikipedia, book3, stack exchange, Freelaw and medical

item.title: MEDITRON (EPFL)
item.description: Parameters: MEDITRON License: open Type: model Llama 2 trained on med data using NVIDIA Megatron-LM. "outperforms Llama-2-70B, GPT-3.5 (text-davinci-003, 8-shot), and Flan-PaLM on multiple medical reasoning tasks."

item.title: Transformers-Arithmetic (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Transformers-Arithmetic License: closed Type: model Proving maths is not memorized. Uses GPT-2-style model. Sébastien Bubeck

item.title: Starling-7B (Berkeley)
item.description: Parameters: Starling-7B License: open Type: model Llama 2 7B -> OpenChat 7B -> Starling-7B (RLAIF)

item.title: Inflection-2 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-2 License: open Type: model “now the 2nd best LLM in the world”. Finished training 19/Nov/2023, waiting for fine-tuning and release.

item.title: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 2.1 License: open Type: model Less hallucinations, 200k context length, tool use

item.title: TÜLU 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: TÜLU 2 License: open Type: model Llama 2 finetune with RLHF direct preference optimization (DPO).

item.title: Nemotron-3 22B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron-3 22B License: open Type: model 8B released, 22B internal.

item.title: Nemotron-2 43B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron-2 43B License: closed Type: model Used to train HelpSteer (16/Nov/2023): https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09528

item.title: Orca 2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Orca 2 License: partial Type: model Llama 2 13B (2T) -> Orca 2 (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: Phi-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-2 License: open Type: model https://twitter.com/SebastienBubeck/status/1724854157004190095

item.title: Florence-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Florence-2 License: open Type: model VLM, Flamingo alt

item.title: Mirasol3B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Mirasol3B License: closed Type: model Combiner + autoregressive transformer for video/audio/text

item.title: OtterHD-8B (NTU)
item.description: Parameters: OtterHD-8B License: open Type: model Evolution of Persimmon-9.3B and Fuyu 8B

item.title: Gauss (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: Gauss License: partial Type: model Gauss Language specializing in generating texts, Gauss Code on software and code description and Gauss Image for image creation.

item.title: Grok-1 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: Grok-1 License: open Type: model Context window=8192. UI: https://twitter.com/TobyPhln/status/1721053802235621734

item.title: Grok-0 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: Grok-0 License: closed Type: model Announced Nov/2023, trained Jul/2023

item.title: Yi-34B (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: Yi-34B License: open Type: model Controversy about Llama 2 base. https://twitter.com/kaifulee/status/1724673131875377465 MMLU=76.3 (PaLM 2=78.3) Outperforms Llama 2. Chinese and English. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-11-05/kai-fu-lee-s-open-source-01-ai-bests-llama-2-according-to-hugging-face

item.title: GPT-4 Turbo (OpenAI)
